tracks.meaning: to strike or hit something lightly with a finger or small object
a device that controls the flow of liquid or gas through a pipe or container
to contact someone or get their attention by making a light knocking sound
the small metal or plastic piece on a shoe sole used to prevent slipping
a device that produces sound through striking, such as in percussion instruments
a touchscreen or input interface that responds to finger contact
a barrel or large container used to store liquids such as beer or wine
a person who is considered easy to manipulate or of little value
rhythmic striking of the floor with the feet, particularly in tap dancing
a tool used to cut internal screw threads inside a hole
to touch or strike gently or repeatedly
to authorize wiretapping or electronic surveillance of a telephone line
